text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm having a meeting with Mejiro Dober in my
office when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry... I just have a bit of a headache. I
already took medicine for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I said I'm fine, so... Urgh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess there's no hiding it... Fine. I'll take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess there's no hiding it... Fine. I'll take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let me rest here for a little while. I don't want
everyone worrying about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober continues to suffer from her
headache for some time.
